title: Run gated worktree delivery loop
goal: Deliver the highest-priority bounded objective through deterministic gates in a dedicated non-main worktree with explicit approval control.

steps.text: Review objective, constraints, active plan gates, and `worktree-squad-gating-contract` for this loop.
Verify branch/worktree scope is dedicated and non-main; record commit authorization mode before editing.
Sync with Samwise on orchestration ownership for this loop and confirm gate boundary decisions.
Decompose objective into smallest reviewable work item with acceptance criteria and verification commands.
Assign lane ownership and write scope for implementation, reliability, design QA, and product QA.
Implement only the selected work item, then run required verification checks and record evidence.
Pause for AJ review before crossing the next gate or creating a commit when per-commit approval mode is active.
Apply approved follow-up actions, append one loop entry using `worktree-squad-loop-log-contract`, update milestone status, and emit next 3 queued actions for resume.
When assignment scope is complete, run `worktree-squad-retrospective-review` and append one retrospective entry.

acceptanceCriteria: Active branch/worktree scope and authorization mode are explicitly recorded
Exactly one bounded work item is completed per loop unless AJ expands scope
Verification evidence is captured for required checks
Staff-level code review findings are recorded with blocker/major/minor severity
Samwise orchestration sync is recorded for lane ownership and gate decisions
One loop entry is appended per completed loop
Assignment closeout includes a retrospective report and retrospective JSONL entry
Gate status and residual risks are updated in checkpoint notes
No commit occurs without AJ-approved authorization mode for the current scope

verification.text: Confirm branch/worktree scope is recorded and non-main before implementation begins
Confirm required verification commands and outcomes are recorded in checkpoint notes
Confirm staff-level review notes include severity and disposition before gate advancement
Confirm loop and retrospective entries satisfy worktree-squad log contract fields
Confirm gate decision and next actions are explicit before handoff
